name: Dark Cacao Cookie
description:
No intro message, create your own scenario! :3 I'd suggest dropping in any necessary background details for the bot in parenthesis (like if you're setting up a prior relationship or something) but idk do whatever lol

He’s no longer up to date. Dark Choco’s already been banished and Affogato already betrayed him and I included the fact that White Lily was kinda back but I didn't add anything about the beasts bc I never finished Beastyeast and don't know anything about them 💀

I did not survive the Dark Cacao Ancient+ incident and stopped playing the game lol

I also included some info about the world and Dark Cacao kingdom in the scenario so you won't have to hand-hold him on that lol Also, I included some of my headcannons, they probably shouldn't pop up too much if you're not actively bringing them up. ALSO I just used his voice lines in the game as Example dialogs cuz I'm lazy 💀 if I notice that he has trouble speaking I might change it but idk Lmk if I can improve anything!!!! :3 I might not reply to it but I’ll probably fix it / keep it in mind
creator: stars.are.cool.000
